tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe wypowiedzi (1.1.–1.6.), wybierając spośród podanych możliwości. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.prompt: I was on top of the _______ when I found out I'd been accepted to the university.
She was _______ with worry when her son didn't come home by midnight.
He was over the _______ when he heard he'd won first prize in the competition.
Speaking in front of an audience always gives me butterflies in my _______.
She was down in the _______ after failing her driving test for the third time.
He was at his _______ end after dealing with the problem for so many months.
